content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
si qoohiyan i niyalma kai
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the Manchu phrase provided. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it has a rich written history. The phrase "si qoohiyan i niyalma kai" seems to be a fragment or part of a larger sentence, but I'll do my best to interpret it.

### those people are four ###

Please note that the translation might not be entirely accurate due to the context dependency of the phrase.
